form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth over 272m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (16.28) behind Hey Mac in a Grade 5 on March 27. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 300m at Taree Super Track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.87) behind Mulwee Princess in a Grade 5 on April 11. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 300m at Taree Super Track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.87) behind Mulwee Princess in a Grade 5 on April 11. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Returns from a 13 months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (23.19) over 400m at Maitland. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 10 lengths behind Hey Mac over 272m. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room on the turn out of the back straight and was checked.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 16.20, beating Chill Out Chick. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on March 12 over 272m at this track behind My Wee Lass beaten 6 lengths (16.41). Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 272m in 16.05. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 400m at this track at Grade 5 level. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (18.59) when second at Richmond in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.
